Menu.Name: Light Sources
Menu.Label: Configure Light Sources
Menu.Hint: Register items as light sources and configure their light pattern, consumption and duration. GM only.

Compat.Name: System Compatibility
Compat.Label: Configure System Compatibility
Compat.Hint: Choose which of the detected system's item and actor types this module uses, and where an item's quantity is stored. GM only.

Config.Title: Light Sources
Config.DropHint: Drag an item of an enabled type here to register it as a light source.
Config.NoItemReference: No linked Item found. Re-drag this light source to enable this action.
Config.DeleteContent: Remove {name} from the registered light sources?
Config.InvalidType: This item's type is not enabled as a light source. Enable it in System Compatibility first.
Config.Duplicate: {name} is already registered as a light source.
Config.ManagedByTooltip: Registered by an external system or module: {name}

Compat.Title: System Compatibility
Compat.SystemNote: Detected system: {system} ({id}). Enable the types this module should treat as light sources and the actors that can carry them.
Compat.ItemsHint: Enable the item types that may be registered as light sources.
Compat.ActorsHint: Enable the actor types whose tokens show the light-source control on the Token HUD.
Compat.NoItemTypes: The active system defines no item types.
Compat.NoActorTypes: The active system defines no actor types.
Compat.QuantityHint: Dotted path to an item's quantity, from the item root (for example: system.quantity). Used to check availability and to subtract one when a light is consumed. Leave empty if the system's items have no quantity — consumable light sources will then never reduce a count.

Fields.PatternsHint: Each pattern is a way this light can be lit — for example a wide, short-range beam versus a narrow, long-range one. The actor picks a pattern from the Token HUD. Consumption and duration are shared across every pattern.
Fields.PreviewHint: Select a token on the canvas to preview these settings on it live as you edit. The token's light is restored automatically when you close this window.
Fields.ConsumeHint: When enabled, activating this light reduces the item quantity by 1. The item stays in the inventory even at zero quantity, but is no longer available to light. The light is never re-consumed automatically.
Fields.DurationHint: Minutes before the light goes out on its own (counted in the mode chosen below). Use 0 for an unlimited light that only goes out when extinguished manually.
Fields.DurationModeHint: In-game time: the light burns down as the GM advances the world clock, and stays lit while the clock is still. Real time: the light burns down in real-world minutes even while the game is paused or the owner is offline.

Hud.DropTooltip: Drop this light on the ground as an Ambient Light
Hud.Dropped: {name} drops {item} as a light on the ground.
Hud.NoGm: No GM is connected to place the light. Ask a GM to log in and try again.

Chat.DragHint: Drag onto an Actor sheet to add it to their inventory.
